title: JUnit
subTitle: Structured backend testing with tagged suites
overviewContent: I use JUnit to test Spring Boot backends at both the unit and integration level, wiring tests into CI quality gates so regressions are caught before merge. I organise suites with @Tag-based grouping (for example separating fast, slow, and manual tests) so the pipeline runs the right subset at the right stage, keeping feedback fast while still covering critical paths.
